summary: Iteration 106 - P1 Security Testing COMPLETE. All 5 backend security tests pass (privilege escalation prevention, forbidden field injection, admin endpoint protection, change password flow with token invalidation, password validations). Frontend UI verified: StorageIndicator with 'Vider' button in Agent Terrain 'Plus' tab, and 'Securite' section with change password form in Profile page.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py lines 428-430: FORBIDDEN_FIELDS properly blocks user_type, is_active, hashed_password, password, roles, password_changed_at, referral_code, sponsor_id, id, _id
auth.py lines 739-810: change-password endpoint correctly validates current password, rejects same password, rejects short password (<6 chars), blacklists old token, issues new token
auth.py lines 815-883: Admin-only endpoints properly check user_type for super_admin/admin access
auth_models.py: UserProfileUpdate model does NOT include user_type field - additional security layer
AgentTerrainDashboard.jsx lines 206-288: StorageIndicator component with data-testid='storage-indicator' and clear cache button with data-testid='clear-cache-btn'
Profile.jsx lines 723-754: Securite section with data-testid='change-password-section' and all form inputs with proper data-testid attributes
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 Security features verified: (1) Privilege escalation blocked via FORBIDDEN_FIELDS in PUT /api/auth/profile, (2) Admin endpoints return 403 for non-admin users, (3) Change password endpoint validates current password, rejects same/short passwords, invalidates old token, issues new token. Frontend: StorageIndicator in Agent 'Plus' tab, change password form in Profile page.

backend_security: test_cannot_escalate_via_profile_update - PASSED: field_agent cannot change user_type to super_admin via PUT /api/auth/profile
test_cannot_inject_forbidden_fields - PASSED: is_active, hashed_password, roles injection returns 400/422
test_admin_endpoints_require_admin_role - PASSED: /api/auth/admin/* endpoints return 403 for non-admin users
test_change_password_flow - PASSED: old token invalidated after password change, new token works, password reverted successfully
test_change_password_validations - PASSED: wrong current password returns 400, same password returns 400
frontend_ui: Agent Terrain 'Plus' tab - StorageIndicator visible with data-testid='storage-indicator'
Agent Terrain 'Plus' tab - 'Vider' (clear cache) button visible with data-testid='clear-cache-btn'
Profile page - 'Securite' section visible with data-testid='change-password-section'
Profile page - 'Modifier mon mot de passe' button visible with data-testid='show-change-password-btn'
Profile page - Change password form shows inputs for current, new, confirm password with proper data-testid attributes
